revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.
revision.text: #redirect[[en:Template:VE documentation/doc]] <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude><includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of Template:VE documentation/doc]]</includeonly>

revision.comment: 1 revision imported: importing redirects I created with chatGPT
revision.text: #redirect[[en:Template:VE documentation/doc]] <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude><includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of Template:VE documentation/doc]]</includeonly>

#redirect[[:en:Template:VE documentation/doc]] <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude><includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of Template:VE documentation/doc]]</includeonly>

{{Documentation subpage}} <!-- PLEASE ADD CATEGORIES AND INTERWIKIS AT THE BOTTOM OF THIS PAGE --> {{ombox|type=style|text=This template was created in 2013, and last edited in 2020. Please use with this in mind, and as appropriately. ''(February 2025)''}}
== Purpose == From January 15, 2001 until July 2013 editing on the English Wikipedia was done using wikimarkup (wikitext). On July 1, 2013 the Visual Editor was added to the interface as a second editing environment, but made the default editor over wikitext, under the idea that it was easier for new editors. The two choices for editing now coexist.
However, numerous project pages exist that provide instruction and explanation about editing, many of them honed after years of consensus discussion and debate to get their wording just so, that are geared entirely toward wikitext editing as it was all that existed when the pages were created and developed. The material on such pages, when read by a user editing with VE, will be incorrect, confusing and cause minor and major errors if followed.
Until such time as the encyclopedia's project pages addressed here are split into VE and wikitext versions, VE is integrated into existing pages, or some mix of the two is completed, this template serves to inform users that a particular page is geared toward wikitext editing so that we do not lead them down the garden path of an inapplicable explanation/instruction page if they are using VE.
=== Usage === *Place {{tlx|VE documentation}} at the top of a subject page and save. *Additional, optional text can be placed at the end of the template using: :{{tlx|VE documentation|''Additional text''}} *This template should ''not'' be [[Wikipedia:Template substitution|substituted]].
*'''style''' apply CSS styling
Example:
{{markup |<nowiki>{{VE documentation|style=width: 25%; font-size: 87%; float:right}}</nowiki> |{{VE documentation|style=width: 50%; font-size: 87%; float:right}}<!-- use double width since the box is constrained--> }}
=== See also === *[[Wikipedia:VisualEditor/User guide]]
<includeonly>{{Sandbox other|| <!-- CATEGORIES AND INTERWIKIS HERE, THANKS --> [[Category:VisualEditor]] }}</includeonly>

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} <!-- PLEASE ADD CATEGORIES AND INTERWIKIS AT THE BOTTOM OF THIS PAGE --> {{ombox|type=style|text=This template was created in 2013, and last edited in 2020. Please use with this in mind, and as appropriately. ''(February 2025)''}}
== Purpose == From January 15, 2001 until July 2013 editing on the English Wikipedia was done using wikimarkup (wikitext). On July 1, 2013 the Visual Editor was added to the interface as a second editing environment, but made the default editor over wikitext, under the idea that it was easier for new editors. The two choices for editing now coexist.
However, numerous project pages exist that provide instruction and explanation about editing, many of them honed after years of consensus discussion and debate to get their wording just so, that are geared entirely toward wikitext editing as it was all that existed when the pages were created and developed. The material on such pages, when read by a user editing with VE, will be incorrect, confusing and cause minor and major errors if followed.
Until such time as the encyclopedia's project pages addressed here are split into VE and wikitext versions, VE is integrated into existing pages, or some mix of the two is completed, this template serves to inform users that a particular page is geared toward wikitext editing so that we do not lead them down the garden path of an inapplicable explanation/instruction page if they are using VE.
=== Usage === *Place {{tlx|VE documentation}} at the top of a subject page and save. *Additional, optional text can be placed at the end of the template using: :{{tlx|VE documentation|''Additional text''}} *This template should ''not'' be [[Wikipedia:Template substitution|substituted]].
*'''style''' apply CSS styling
Example:
{{markup |<nowiki>{{VE documentation|style=width: 25%; font-size: 87%; float:right}}</nowiki> |{{VE documentation|style=width: 50%; font-size: 87%; float:right}}<!-- use double width since the box is constrained--> }}
=== See also === *[[Wikipedia:VisualEditor/User guide]]
<includeonly>{{Sandbox other|| <!-- CATEGORIES AND INTERWIKIS HERE, THANKS --> [[Category:VisualEditor]] }}</includeonly> <noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} <!-- PLEASE ADD CATEGORIES AND INTERWIKIS AT THE BOTTOM OF THIS PAGE --> {{ombox|type=style|text=This template was created in 2013, and last edited in 2020. Please use with this in mind, and as appropriately. ''(February 2025)''}}
== Purpose == From January 15, 2001 until July 2013 editing on the English Wikipedia was done using wikimarkup (wikitext). On July 1, 2013 the Visual Editor was added to the interface as a second editing environment, but made the default editor over wikitext, under the idea that it was easier for new editors. The two choices for editing now coexist.
However, numerous project pages exist that provide instruction and explanation about editing, many of them honed after years of consensus discussion and debate to get their wording just so, that are geared entirely toward wikitext editing as it was all that existed when the pages were created and developed. The material on such pages, when read by a user editing with VE, will be incorrect, confusing and cause minor and major errors if followed.
Until such time as the encyclopedia's project pages addressed here are split into VE and wikitext versions, VE is integrated into existing pages, or some mix of the two is completed, this template serves to inform users that a particular page is geared toward wikitext editing so that we do not lead them down the garden path of an inapplicable explanation/instruction page if they are using VE.
=== Usage === *Place {{tlx|VE documentation}} at the top of a subject page and save. *Additional, optional text can be placed at the end of the template using: :{{tlx|VE documentation|''Additional text''}} *This template should ''not'' be [[Wikipedia:Template substitution|substituted]].
*'''style''' apply CSS styling
Example:
{{markup |<nowiki>{{VE documentation|style=width: 25%; font-size: 87%; float:right}}</nowiki> |{{VE documentation|style=width: 50%; font-size: 87%; float:right}}<!-- use double width since the box is constrained--> }}
=== See also === *[[Wikipedia:VisualEditor/User guide]]
<includeonly>{{Sandbox other|| <!-- CATEGORIES AND INTERWIKIS HERE, THANKS --> [[Category:VisualEditor]] }}</includeonly>

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} <!-- PLEASE ADD CATEGORIES AND INTERWIKIS AT THE BOTTOM OF THIS PAGE --> {{ombox|type=style|text=This template was created in 2013, and last edited in 2020. Please use with this in mind, and as appropriately. ''(February 2025)''}}
== Purpose == From January 15, 2001 until July 2013 editing on the English Wikipedia was done using wikimarkup (wikitext). On July 1, 2013 the Visual Editor was added to the interface as a second editing environment, but made the default editor over wikitext, under the idea that it was easier for new editors. The two choices for editing now coexist.
However, numerous project pages exist that provide instruction and explanation about editing, many of them honed after years of consensus discussion and debate to get their wording just so, that are geared entirely toward wikitext editing as it was all that existed when the pages were created and developed. The material on such pages, when read by a user editing with VE, will be incorrect, confusing and cause minor and major errors if followed.
Until such time as the encyclopedia's project pages addressed here are split into VE and wikitext versions, VE is integrated into existing pages, or some mix of the two is completed, this template serves to inform users that a particular page is geared toward wikitext editing so that we do not lead them down the garden path of an inapplicable explanation/instruction page if they are using VE.
=== Usage === *Place {{tlx|VE documentation}} at the top of a subject page and save. *Additional, optional text can be placed at the end of the template using: :{{tlx|VE documentation|''Additional text''}} *This template should ''not'' be [[Wikipedia:Template substitution|substituted]].
*'''style''' apply CSS styling
Example:
{{markup |<nowiki>{{VE documentation|style=width: 25%; font-size: 87%; float:right}}</nowiki> |{{VE documentation|style=width: 50%; font-size: 87%; float:right}}<!-- use double width since the box is constrained--> }}
=== See also === *[[Wikipedia:VisualEditor/User guide]]
<includeonly>{{Sandbox other|| <!-- CATEGORIES AND INTERWIKIS HERE, THANKS --> [[Category:VisualEditor]] }}</includeonly> [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 2 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23692667944|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} <!-- PLEASE ADD CATEGORIES AND INTERWIKIS AT THE BOTTOM OF THIS PAGE --> {{ombox|type=style|text=This template was created in 2013, and last edited in 2020. Please use with this in mind, and as appropriately. ''(February 2025)''}}
== Purpose == From January 15, 2001 until July 2013 editing on the English Wikipedia was done using wikimarkup (wikitext). On July 1, 2013 the Visual Editor was added to the interface as a second editing environment, but made the default editor over wikitext, under the idea that it was easier for new editors. The two choices for editing now coexist.
However, numerous project pages exist that provide instruction and explanation about editing, many of them honed after years of consensus discussion and debate to get their wording just so, that are geared entirely toward wikitext editing as it was all that existed when the pages were created and developed. The material on such pages, when read by a user editing with VE, will be incorrect, confusing and cause minor and major errors if followed.
Until such time as the encyclopedia's project pages addressed here are split into VE and wikitext versions, VE is integrated into existing pages, or some mix of the two is completed, this template serves to inform users that a particular page is geared toward wikitext editing so that we do not lead them down the garden path of an inapplicable explanation/instruction page if they are using VE.
=== Usage === *Place {{tlx|VE documentation}} at the top of a subject page and save. *Additional, optional text can be placed at the end of the template using: :{{tlx|VE documentation|''Additional text''}} *This template should ''not'' be [[Wikipedia:Template substitution|substituted]].
*'''style''' apply CSS styling
Example:
{{markup |<nowiki>{{VE documentation|style=width: 25%; font-size: 87%; float:right}}</nowiki> |{{VE documentation|style=width: 50%; font-size: 87%; float:right}}<!-- use double width since the box is constrained--> }}
=== See also === *[[Wikipedia:VisualEditor/User guide]]
<includeonly>{{Sandbox other|| <!-- CATEGORIES AND INTERWIKIS HERE, THANKS --> }}</includeonly> <noinclude> [[Category:VisualEditor]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24999656626|time triggered pipeline]]
